description: Create a Hubble Palette color composite PNG of the Eagle Nebula (M16) using source files in ~/AstroImages/eagle_nebula/. The composite must map [SII] (673nmos.fits) to the Red channel, H-alpha (656nmos.fits) to the Green channel, and [OIII] (502nmos.fits) to the Blue channel. Ensure the 'Pillars of Creation' are clearly visible through appropriate brightness and contrast adjustments. Save the final image to ~/AstroImages/processed/eagle_nebula_hubble_palette.png.
